tasks.subject: Task 0: CancelToken + Cancelled foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `CancelToken` primitive and `Cancelled` exception with no callers yet. Pure foundation.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/cancel.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/errors.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_cancel.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `from kinoforge.core import CancelToken, Cancelled` works.
- [ ] `CancelToken().is_set()` False initially; True after `.set()`.
- [ ] `CancelToken().wait(0.05)` returns False on timeout; True when set mid-wait (< 0.5s).
- [ ] `raise_if_set()` no-op when unset; raises `Cancelled` when set.
- [ ] Module exposes `_NULL_TOKEN` sentinel.
- [ ] `Cancelled` subclasses `KinoforgeError`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_cancel.py -v` â†’ 7 PASS.

See plan Â§Task 0 for full code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/cancel.py", "src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "src/kinoforge/core/__init__.py", "tests/core/test_cancel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_cancel.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["from kinoforge.core import CancelToken, Cancelled works", "CancelToken().is_set() False initially; True after .set()", "wait() returns False on timeout, True when set mid-wait within 0.5s", "raise_if_set() no-op when unset, raises Cancelled when set", "_NULL_TOKEN exposed and never set", "Cancelled subclasses KinoforgeError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: ABC + pool signature changes + bounded close watchdog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Plumb `cancel_token=None` through `BackendPool` + `GenerationBackend` ABCs and into `SequentialPool` / `ConcurrentPool`. Add `cancel_pending` + `timeout` kwargs to `ConcurrentPool.close` with a bounded watchdog. All concrete backends accept (and ignore) the new kwarg.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/pool.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/remote_backend.py`, every `src/kinoforge/engines/*/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_pool_cancel.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_pool_cancel.py tests/core/test_pool.py tests/engines/ -v` â†’ all PASS.

See plan Â§Task 1 for full code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/pool.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/bedrock_video/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/core/remote_backend.py", "tests/core/test_pool_cancel.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_pool_cancel.py tests/core/test_pool.py tests/engines/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BackendPool.submit + GenerationBackend.submit/.result ABCs accept cancel_token kwarg", "SequentialPool.submit forwards token", "ConcurrentPool.submit forwards token through executor closure", "ConcurrentPool.close(cancel_pending=True, timeout=0.5) returns <1.5s with wedged worker; emits WARN", "ConcurrentPool.close() with no kwargs preserves today's behavior", "All concrete backends accept cancel_token kwarg", "Existing pool/backend tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ComfyUI per-tick poll log + poll_timeout_s + cooperative cancel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `ComfyUIBackend.result` honors the cancel token, emits a structured per-tick INFO log, and raises `TimeoutError` after `poll_timeout_s` (default 600s).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py`, `src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_comfyui_cancel.py`, `tests/engines/test_comfyui_timeout.py`, `tests/engines/test_comfyui_poll_log.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui_cancel.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_timeout.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_poll_log.py tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v` â†’ all PASS.

See plan Â§Task 2 for full code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_cancel.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_timeout.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_poll_log.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui_cancel.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_timeout.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_poll_log.py tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ComfyUIEngineConfig.poll_timeout_s field defaults to 600.0", "result(cancel_token=<set>) raises Cancelled with zero http_get calls", "Inter-poll wait honors token set() within poll_interval_s", "TimeoutError after poll_timeout_s contains last_status= and exec_node=", "Each poll tick emits structured INFO line with 5 fields", "queue_pos None when status != queued; real value via /queue when queued"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: RemoteSubmitPollBackend cancel honoring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `RemoteSubmitPollBackend.result` honors `cancel_token` (Replicate / Runway / Luma / Fal inherit).

tasks.subject: Task 4: Orchestrator stage-loop except + deploy_session cancel-aware close
carryForwards: KeyframeStage cancel_token plumbing (waits on ImageBackend cancel honoring)
pool.map cancel_token forwarding for t2v fan-out
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `generate` + `deploy_session` accept `cancel_token=None`. Stage-loop except arms at lines 1085 + 1173 gain `(KeyboardInterrupt, Cancelled)` clause that logs WARN naming pod ID + `kinoforge reap` and does NOT destroy. `deploy_session.__exit__` passes cancel_pending to pool.close(timeout=30.0).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_orchestrator_interrupt.py`, `tests/core/test_orchestrator_cancelled.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_interrupt.py tests/core/test_orchestrator_cancelled.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v` â†’ all PASS.

See plan Â§Task 4 for full code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_interrupt.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_cancelled.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_interrupt.py tests/core/test_orchestrator_cancelled.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generate + deploy_session accept cancel_token kwarg", "KeyboardInterrupt mid-stage does NOT call destroy_instance", "Cancelled mid-stage does NOT call destroy_instance", "Both emit one WARN with pod ID + kinoforge reap substring", "ValidationError still destroys (preserved)", "deploy_session.__exit__ branches on token state for pool.close kwargs", "GenerateClipStage forwards cancel_token into pool.submit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CLI SIGINT handler + SessionContext.cancel_token
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLI installs SIGINT handler in `main()` for `generate` / `batch` subcommands. First press sets token; second restores SIG_DFL + re-raises. `SessionContext.cancel_token` carries the token.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/context.py`, `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`, `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`
- Create: `tests/cli/test_sigint_handler.py`

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_sigint_handler.py tests/cli/ -v` â†’ all PASS.

See plan Â§Task 5 for full code.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/context.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_sigint_handler.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_sigint_handler.py tests/cli/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SessionContext.cancel_token uses default_factory=CancelToken", "main() installs handler only for generate/batch subcommands", "First SIGINT sets token, no raise", "Second SIGINT raises KeyboardInterrupt + restores SIG_DFL", "_cmd_generate + _cmd_batch pass ctx.cancel_token into generate/batch_generate"]}
```
